# name: # Canonical dependency manifest for i2p (welcome hooks + the status line, folded in from concierge).
# TAB-separated (4 fields). See PREREQUISITES/. i2p degrades gracefully — its hooks and the status line
# fall back to pure-bash when a tool is absent, so nothing here is hard-required beyond bash itself.

install-hint: apt install jq (clean JSON for hooks + statusline; pure-bash fallback otherwise)
apt install git (statusline branch field; degrades to harness-provided fields)
preinstalled on most systems (statusline numeric formatting and gauges)
